backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a donation tracking system with functions to submit donations, retrieve totals/counts, query recent donations sorted by timestamp or amount, and search donations by donor or minimum amount.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three completed features: updating landing page copy for True Hope Foundation, generating a new hero banner image, and updating campaign configuration with appropriate fundraising goals.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing the True Hope Foundation donation platform components, including landing page, donation form, campaign progress, styling with warm humanitarian color palette, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file (content has been moved to frontend/src/index.css).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with outdated title 'Gaza Relief Fundraiser' that needs updating to reflect True Hope Foundation branding.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the LandingPage component.
frontend/src/components/donations/Campai: React component displaying campaign progress with total raised, donation count, goal amount, progress bar, and statistics using React Query to fetch data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/components/donations/Donati: React component providing a donation form with preset and custom amount selection, optional name/message fields, validation, submission handling via React Query mutation, and success confirmation display.
frontend/src/components/donations/Recent: React component fetching and displaying the 10 most recent donations with amounts, donor names, messages, timestamps, and handling for empty states and anonymous donations.
frontend/src/config/campaign.ts: Campaign configuration exporting a $250,000 fundraising goal and USD currency settings for True Hope Foundation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning the actor instance and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, defining design tokens for colors, borders, and UI components.
frontend/src/lib/format.ts: Utility functions for formatting currency (USD), parsing numeric amounts, and converting nanosecond timestamps to human-readable relative time strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers for state management and authentication.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Main landing page component for True Hope Foundation featuring hero section, campaign progress, donation form, recent donations, impact categories, and FAQ accordion sections.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH colors, container settings, border radius variables, animations, and typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features for a humanitarian donation website (truehopefoundation.in) including landing page, donation forms, progress tracking, and visual theming requirements.
